name: Lead Generation → Score → CRM → Outreach
description: Scrape leads, normalize, LLM-score + extract structured records, write clean records to CRM, send batch outreach summary, notify team, track metrics.

steps.prompt: You are a B2B lead scoring assistant for Bridge AI. Given these scraped leads, return a JSON array of lead objects. Each object must have: name (string), email (string or null), company (string), score (1-10 integer), hook (one-line personalized outreach opener), intent (string), status (always 'new'). Leads data: {{_prev}}
steps.system: Return ONLY a valid JSON array. No markdown. No explanation. Just the array.
steps.label: LLM score + extract structured leads

steps.name: email_sender

input.subject: New leads batch ready — {{count}} leads scored
input.body: Lead generation complete. New leads have been scored and written to CRM. Top leads ready for nurture sequence.

steps.label: Notify sales team of new batch

steps.message: Lead generation complete. {{count}} leads written to CRM and queued for nurture.
steps.label: Notify team on Slack
